problem_title: Travel Rule evidence remains scattered across systems
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to compile complete and auditable Travel Rule evidence as message data, exceptions, and routing statuses stay disconnected. This fragmentation slows review processes and weakens the traceability of compliance decisions for regulatory inspection readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status, exceptions, and case actions into one structured workflow that preserves audit-ready evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY moves Travel Rule message exceptions into structured case workflows where reviews, decisions and audit evidence support compliance reporting and operational control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, routing data, customer records and cases to create structured compliance workflows for VASPs and regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes failed, incomplete or high-risk Travel Rule events to compliance teams for review, case creation and escalation with full evidence capture.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting documentation to maintain audit-ready evidence packages for Travel Rule reviews and regulator requests.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing Travel Rule providers, consolidating their outputs into one operational workflow without replacing underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but acts as a compliance control layer that structures their outputs into cases, evidence and regulatory reports.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready Travel Rule evidence packages
